title: Super Mario World Glitch
description:
The glitch is pretty easy to pull off. This was in Kaizo Mario 2, level 3.

It's pretty self-explanatory. When you're riding a rope on a track (as shown), get pinned against a wall, while still holding on. You'll stay against the wall, while the rope goes away. At this point, you're still technically holding on to the rope...only now, you can go wherever you want, and upon pressing up or down, you'll be climbing the air.

This glitch wears off once you grab another rope, which is why I avoided the rest of them throughout the level.

EDIT: Crap, I guess someone already beat me to this...oh well, I'll just keep the video up anyway. =P
